tasks.description: Create a calculator wrapper with add, multiply, subtract, divide.
Write a string reversal function.
Write a function that checks if a string is a palindrome.
Write a function that iterates through a list and filters out odd numbers.
Write a map-reduce sequence to sum an array.
Convert all strings in a list to uppercase.
Write a function to read a CSV file into a Python dict.
Write a function to save a Python dict into a JSON file.
Write a function that counts the frequency of words in a sentence.
Find the maximum and minimum numbers in an unsorted list.
Create an Animal base class and an inherited Dog class with polymorphic methods.
Write a mock API Client using the requests library that returns fake GET endpoints.
Write a Regex function that strictly validates an email address.
Write a Regex function that validates a strong password (1 Uppercase, 1 Number, 8 chars).
Write a dictionary deep-merge algorithm.
Implement an exception handler that gracefully manages division by zero and logs a warning.
Write a script to parse ISO-8601 timestamps into human-readable strings.
Write an efficient recursive function to calculate the Nth number in the Fibonacci sequence.
Write an async/await sequence that fires two sleep statements concurrently and awaits both.
Write a mock SQLite connection setup that creates a User table securely.
